title: Bulbocodium simile
taxonomy: Bulbocodium simile is classified as a species of flowering plant in the genus Bulbocodium, which is a group of small, bulbous perennials native to the Iberian Peninsula. The genus Bulbocodium belongs to the family Colchicaceae, which is a family of flowering plants commonly known as the colchicums. This family is further classified under the order Liliales, which consists of various lily-like plants. The order Liliales is part of the larger class Liliopsida, which includes all monocotyledonous flowering plants that have one cotyledon in their seeds. Bulbocodium simile is thus a member of the broader group of lily-like plants.
